auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to the PIM admin panel
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

placeholder.title: Coming soon
placeholder.description: This view is planned. It will be implemented in a follow-up view-first ticket.

menu.title: Main menu
menu.intro: Drag items to reorder. Hidden items appear below — click Add to put them back in the menu.
menu.empty_available_prefix: To add an ObjectType to the menu, enable “Expose to main menu” in
menu.protected_tooltip: This item is required and cannot be hidden

security.title: Security
security.intro: Change your password and configure MFA. Full session management and hardware keys arrive in follow-up tickets.

change_password.title: Change password
change_password.intro: Confirm the current password and pick a new one. You will be signed out — log back in with the new credential.

security.toast_success: Password updated. Sign in again with the new password.
security.error_too_short: The new password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
security.error_generic: Could not change the password. Please try again.

api_tokens.title: API tokens
api_tokens.intro: Programmatic tokens for integrations and the CLI. The plaintext token is shown exactly once on creation — copy it immediately.
api_tokens.empty: No tokens yet. Click „Create token” once it lands (#700).

billing.title: Subscription
billing.intro: Current tenant plan. The full payment-gateway integration ships in Phase 1 — plan changes go through support until then.
billing.upgrade_hint: Need to change your plan? Use the button below to message support.
billing.coming_soon_description: MVP does not charge inside PIM — Stripe + VAT invoices land in Phase 1. Support will adjust the plan manually and send a proforma invoice in the meantime.
billing.forbidden_description: Only the tenant Owner can see the Subscription page. Reach out to your administrator if you need access.

users.title: Users
users.intro: Manage user accounts inside this tenant. Magic-link invitations, MFA and role assignment land in follow-up tickets.

invite.title: Invite user
invite.intro: We'll send a magic-link to the given email. The user picks a password and optionally enables MFA on first sign-in.
invite.field_role_hint: Single role in MVP — multi-role assignment lands in user editor (#693).
invite.success_body: Magic-link sent to {{email}}. The token expires in 7 days.
invite.token_hint: In production the token is only in the email. This field is dev-only.
invite.error_forbidden: You do not have permission to invite users.

users.filter_role_pending_hint: Role filter unlocks once role management ships (#695).

deactivate.title: Deactivate user
deactivate.body: User {{name}} ({{email}}) will no longer be able to sign in. The active session is invalidated on the next API request.
deactivate.reason_placeholder: E.g. left the company, contract ended...

users.empty_description: No user matches the current filters. Clear them or invite the first user.

roles.title: Roles
roles.intro: Seeded system templates + per-tenant custom roles. Permission editing, duplicating and creating new custom roles arrive in follow-up tickets.
roles.empty: No roles available for this tenant.
roles.system_immutable_hint: System roles are immutable — create a custom role if you need different permissions.

catalogs_pdf.placeholder_description: PDF catalog generation is in the backlog. Scope will be defined in a separate ticket.

topbar.agent_mock_tooltip: MOCK · Agent layer requires implementation (epic 0.7, Phase 2)
topbar.audit_log_tooltip: MOCK · Audit log requires BE endpoint

hero.title: Ask the agent or search the catalog
hero.subtitle: The dashboard shows PIM traffic, integration status and agent suggestions. Every block is a mock; backend wiring lands in later tickets.

kpi.settings_description: Pick up to {{max}} tiles for the dashboard. Selection persists in the browser.

completeness.title: Completeness
completeness.subtitle: overall and per channel — publish readiness

attributes.list_subtitle: Schema definitions reused across catalog objects.
attributes.empty: No attributes for the current tenant.
attributes.write_deferred_note: Manual create / edit / drag-and-drop is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2). The seeder ships the MVP attribute set.

attribute_groups.list_subtitle: Logical grouping for attribute layout in forms.
attribute_groups.empty: No attribute groups for the current tenant.
attribute_groups.write_deferred_note: Manual create / edit is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2).

assets.list_subtitle: Digital assets — images, video, documents — referenced from products and categories.

upload.allowed_formats: Accepted: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, PDF
upload.failed_duplicate: File is already in the library.
upload.duplicate_dialog_body: An asset with the same content already exists ({{code}}). Open the existing entry or cancel.

detail.delete_confirm_body: {{filename}} will disappear from the library. Linked products will lose the reference. This cannot be undone.
detail.code_help: Unique asset code (slug). Changing the code changes the /assets/<code> address.
detail.tags_help: Separate tags with comma or Enter.

bulk.delete_confirm_body: {{count}} assets will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
bulk.delete_error: Some assets could not be deleted.

channels.list_subtitle: Publication targets — locales, currencies, and attribute mapping per kind.
channels.empty: No channels for the current tenant.

delete.confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. All field mappings for {{name}} will be removed.

fields.code_help: Lowercase, characters: a-z, 0-9, _. Immutable after creation.

validation.code_format: Only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores.

mapping.title: Attribute mapping
mapping.subtitle: Define how each attribute maps to a field in the target integration format.
mapping.empty_object_type: No attributes to map for this object type. Attach attributes from the Modeling section first.

placeholder.preview: Per-channel product preview lands in 0.10.6 (API Configurator).

categories.list_subtitle: Hierarchical taxonomy backed by Postgres ltree.
categories.empty: No categories for the current tenant.
categories.no_attributes: This category has no attribute values yet.
categories.write_deferred_note: Drag-and-drop reparenting + create/edit forms are deferred to a follow-up ticket — the read-only tree ships in this PR.

object_types.list_subtitle: Schema carriers for catalog kinds (ADR-009). Custom kinds unblock in Faza 2.
object_types.custom_disabled_explanation: Custom ObjectTypes (kind=custom) are stored in the database from day one but disabled by feature flag in MVP. The schema-add agent in Faza 2 will mint and configure them through natural-language requests.
object_types.custom_empty: No custom ObjectTypes yet — create your first one above.
object_types.custom_present_note: {{count}} custom ObjectType(s) exist in this tenant; visible after Faza 2 unlock.

create_custom.title: Create custom ObjectType
create_custom.subtitle: Custom kinds (e.g. service, kit, bundle) ship with no built-in business logic — only the schema. Attach AttributeGroups and start adding rows from the modeling UI.
create_custom.code_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, underscore. Must be unique per tenant.
create_custom.validation: Code and at least one label entry are required.

object_types.empty: No object types for the current tenant.
object_types.write_deferred_note: Editing built-in ObjectTypes (label / labelAttribute / imageAttribute / completenessRules) is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2).

coming_soon.body: This view is part of epic {{epic}}. It is not implemented yet — track progress on GitHub Issues.

multimedia.title: Multimedia
multimedia.empty: No linked files. Upload new ones or pick from the library.
multimedia.upload_dialog_body: Uploaded files land in the product folder and are auto-linked.
multimedia.picker_body: Selected files will be linked (m2m) to the product. They stay in their original folder.
multimedia.picker_empty: No files to pick in this folder.

products.list_subtitle: Catalogue of products scoped to the current tenant.
products.empty: No products yet. Create one to get started.
products.import_disabled: Mock — CSV/XLSX import endpoint is pending

toolbar.search_placeholder: Search by SKU, name, EAN, attribute…

show.no_attributes: This object has no attribute values yet.

products.no_object_type: No built-in product ObjectType is available. Run the catalog seeder.

validation.sku_max: SKU can be at most 64 characters.
validation.name_max: Name can be at most 255 characters.

delete.confirm_body: Are you sure you want to delete product {{code}}? This action cannot be undone.

variants.empty: No variants — add one or generate from axes.
variants.title: Variants

create.hint: Once the product is saved, the rest of the tabs, sidebar, and completeness indicators appear.

validation.object_type_missing: No built-in ObjectType found — run the catalog seeder

variants.empty_body: No variants. Generate from axes above or add manually.

api_profiles.list_subtitle: Per-integrator presets — visible ObjectTypes, attributes, filters, webhooks.
api_profiles.create_subtitle: Basic info — attributes / filters / webhook configuration land in #92 / #93.
api_profiles.empty: No profiles yet. Create one to expose a curated API surface to an integrator.

form.object_types_help: Built-in product / category / asset types — pick which classes of objects this profile exposes.
form.attributes_help: Pick attribute codes the API will project. Anything not on this list is stripped from the response.
form.filters_help: Server-side filters applied on every request through this profile. Empty = no filter.
form.preview_help: Local preview of the response shape with selected attributes. Live preview against a real product lands in #95 (`/api/profiles/{code}/test`).
form.preview_live_note: Sample values are mocked per attribute type. Hit the test endpoint for real data.
form.webhook_help: Outbound webhooks fire HMAC-signed POSTs to the URL on each subscribed event. The signature lands in `X-Pim-Signature: sha256=<hex>`.
form.webhook_url_help: Leave empty to disable outbound webhooks. URL must accept POST with JSON body.
form.webhook_secret_note: The secret is stored server-side and shown only on rotation. Use "Regenerate secret" on the profile page.
form.webhook_events_help: Pick events that trigger a delivery. Catalog events from #47 — listing per ObjectKind.

fields.code_help: Lowercase letters, digits, dashes or underscores. Cannot be changed after creation.
fields.name: Name
fields.rate_limit_help: Requests per hour granted to keys scoped to this profile.

show.no_keys: No keys reference this profile yet. Generate one via pim:apikey:generate CLI.
show.keys_management_note: Full key management UI (generate / revoke / rotate) lands in a follow-up.
show.no_webhook_url: No webhook configured. Set a URL in the Webhook tab to enable HMAC-signed delivery.
show.webhook_test_failed: Delivery failed — check the URL is reachable.
show.webhook_secret_warning: Capture this now — old subscribers must update. Closing this view discards it.
show.webhook_history_note: Delivery history + retry log lands in a follow-up (Faza 1 monitoring).

validation.code_format: Code must be lowercase letters, digits, dashes or underscores.
validation.rate_limit_range: Rate limit must be between 1 and 100000.

errors.create_failed: Could not create the profile. Check the code is unique within the tenant.

modeling.title: Modeling
modeling.description: Define ObjectTypes, Attributes, Attribute Groups and Categories used across the catalog.

built_in_lock.label: Locked
built_in_lock.tooltip: System type — protected from edits or deletion.

audit_log.label: Audit log
audit_log.mock_tooltip: MOCK · Audit log requires BE endpoint

attributes.system_immutable_note: System attribute — code, type, and validation are immutable.

migration.title: Migrate type — {{name}}
migration.description: Change the data type of this attribute. Current type: {{from}}. Existing values will be re-shaped per the mapping plan; the original payload is snapshotted into attribute_migration_backups before any update.
migration.mapping_empty: Click "Suggest mappings" to inspect existing values.
migration.force: Force destructive migration (e.g. multiselect → select picks first).
migration.blocked: This migration path is not supported in MVP.
migration.force_required: This migration is destructive. Tick Force to confirm.
migration.error_generic: Could not run migration. Check your input or retry.

attribute_groups.members_empty: No attributes attached. Use the API to attach attributes (UI follow-up).
attribute_groups.attach_deferred_note: Attach / detach UI lands in a follow-up — wire the AttachAttributeToGroup command first. visible_when + reorder are live now (UI-08.8).

inheritance_preview.title: Effective attribute groups preview
inheritance_preview.description: What an object of the chosen kind would see if placed under this category.
inheritance_preview.empty: No effective groups for this combination.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Imports, exports, connectors and API Configurator

placeholder.sources_subtitle: SFTP/FTP/HTTP source configuration — activated in VIEW-IMP-03
placeholder.schedule_subtitle: Recurring import schedule — activated in VIEW-IMP-04
placeholder.profiles_subtitle: Mapping profiles library — activated in VIEW-IMP-02

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Recurring cron jobs. The dispatcher daemon ships in the follow-up — MVP supports manual "Run now" triggers.

empty.title: No schedules yet
empty.subtitle: Add your first cron job to automate imports.

timeline.empty: No scheduled runs in the selected horizon.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.notify_hint: Real transport (Slack/Email/Webhook) ships in VIEW-IMP-04.1 — MVP saves the configuration, but no notifications are sent yet.

errors.cron_invalid: Cron expression must have 5 space-separated fields.

delete.title: Delete schedule
delete.confirm: Delete schedule "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.description: Where PIM picks up files. Each source has its own health-check and optional mapping profile. The polling daemon (auto-pickup) ships in a follow-up.

empty.title: No sources yet
empty.subtitle: Add your first SFTP / watch folder / webhook to start centralising inbound files.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.auth_hint: Symfony Secrets Vault key — credential plaintext never lands in the database.

errors.poll_range: Polling must be between 30 and 86400 seconds.

delete.title: Delete source
delete.confirm: Delete source "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

profiles.title: Mapping profiles
profiles.description: A profile is a saved rule set for reading a file format: columns to attributes, import mode, encoding, delimiter. Versioned, exportable as JSON.

list.empty_filtered: No profiles match the current filter.

new_profile_card.title: New mapping profile
new_profile_card.subtitle: Start from scratch or import a JSON envelope from another environment.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.code_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only. Defaults to a slug of the name.

delete.title: Delete mapping profile
delete.confirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

sessions.title: Import sessions
sessions.description: Every file entering PIM goes through the same pipeline: parsing → mapping → validation → write. Below is the last 30 days history.

kpi.no_errors: No failed sessions in the last 30 days.

live.heading: In progress
live.empty: No active imports. Start with "New import" to launch a new session.

history.heading: History
history.empty_filtered: No sessions match the current filter.

list.title: Imports
list.empty: No imports yet. Start your first import.

wizard.title: New import
wizard.subtitle: Every file goes through 4 steps: upload, map columns to attributes, validate with a dry-run, commit to the database. After commit the session shows up under "Sessions" — you can roll it back within 24h.

descriptions.upload: CSV / XLSX + optional ZIP with images

upload.drop_csv: Drop CSV / Excel file or pick one

image_source.label: Image source
image_source.http: HTTP links in the file (image_1, image_2…)

mapping.header: Auto-mapping done: {{auto}}/{{total}} columns matched. Map {{manual}} manually.
mapping.category_hint: Links the product to the category whose code matches the cell

error_types.category_not_found: Category not found (product imported without assignment)

backup.label: Create full database backup (pgBackRest)
backup.hint_rollback: Without backup: 24h soft rollback is still available

confirm.email: Email me when done (> 5 min runtime)
confirm.warning: Action is final. You can rollback within 24h.

progress.title: Import running
progress.close_hint: You can close this tab. We will send an email when the run finishes.

profile_manager.title: My import profiles
profile_manager.disclaimer: Editing a profile only affects future imports. It does not touch past sessions.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.body: You do not have permission to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your tenant administrator.

last_admin.title: Cannot leave the tenant without an Administrator
last_admin.body: User {{user}} is the last Administrator on this tenant.
last_admin.guidance: Assign the Administrator role to another user first, then come back to this action.

owner_uniqueness.title: A tenant can only have one Owner
owner_uniqueness.body: The Owner role is already assigned to another user.
owner_uniqueness.body_with_owner: The Owner role is already assigned to {{owner}}.
owner_uniqueness.guidance: Use the ownership transfer flow (Settings → Tenant) instead of assigning Owner twice.

accept_invitation.invalid_body_malformed: The invitation link is malformed. Make sure you copied the whole URL from the email.
accept_invitation.invalid_body_not_found: This invitation does not exist. It may have already been accepted or revoked.
accept_invitation.expired_body: The invitation for {{email}} has expired. Ask {{tenant_name}} for a fresh invite.
accept_invitation.revoked_body: An administrator revoked the invitation for {{email}}. Contact {{tenant_name}} if this is a mistake.
accept_invitation.accepted_body: The account for {{email}} already exists. Sign in normally with the password you set earlier.
accept_invitation.valid_body: Set a password for {{email}} — you'll use it on every sign-in.
accept_invitation.error_too_short: Password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
accept_invitation.error_generic: Could not activate the account. Please try again.
accept_invitation.toast_accepted_login_required: Account activated. Please sign in to continue.
